title: Airbus A320 web reference source discovery

requestedComponents.label: first-officer side-stick and seat relationship
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Find real A320 cockpit references that show first-officer side-stick placement, sidewall spacing, and seat relationship. Simulator sources may only be presentation references.

requestedComponents.label: main display arrangement
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Prioritize A320-family display layout and glareshield relationship from official or license-screened sources.

requestedComponents.label: flight-control-unit and glareshield geometry
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Record FCU/glareshield viewpoint, cockpit family, and whether the source is real aircraft, simulator, or manufacturer context.

requestedComponents.label: pedestal and thrust lever quadrant
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Find A320 pedestal/thrust quadrant references with clear license terms before any download.

requestedComponents.label: overhead panel density and lighting
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Find A320 overhead references and record whether they are exact A320, A320-family, or simulator/presentation only.

requestedComponents.label: cockpit volume and window proportions
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Find wide A320 cockpit views for window, sidewall, and first-officer volume proportions.
